overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City. The player character moves from under a billboard-covered transit overpass through sunlit urban streets toward a massive megabuilding, passing industrial areas with smokestacks and turning at an intersection featuring a retro diner.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit overpass with digital advertising

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, approaching the street intersection ahead

entered.detail: large metal transit structure with multiple digital billboards mounted underneath
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
multiple glowing advertisement screens attached to the overpass structure
standard traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive transit overpass with digital billboards displaying advertisements. The player walks along a graffiti-covered wall on the right, moving from the sheltered area toward the open street where sunlight becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with red industrial complex and megabuilding view

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk with the red industrial building on the left, moving toward the massive tower in the distance

notable_agents.action: person wearing bright pink pants walking across the street ahead

entered.detail: large red-brick industrial complex with multiple levels and external piping
massive futuristic skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead
tall street lamp with orange glowing light fixture
large vertical advertisement showing a samurai character

segments.scene_description: Having exited the overpass, the scene opens into a sunlit urban street. A distinctive red industrial building occupies the left side while a massive megabuilding towers ahead. The player passes a pedestrian in pink pants crossing the street as they continue toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with smokestacks and elevated transit walkway

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing passage
begins crossing the intersection toward the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while approaching the megabuilding, with industrial smokestacks visible to the right

notable_agents.action: teal station wagon driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall red and white industrial chimneys emitting smoke
metal pedestrian bridge spanning across the street ahead
low-rise building with retro styling and circular neon sign
multi-story industrial building with orange facade and horizontal windows

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more industrial area with prominent smokestacks and an elevated walkway crossing overhead. The player crosses the intersection as the traffic light changes, passing a teal car and approaching Tom's Diner on the right corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner intersection with retro diner and narrow street entrance

events.description: turns right at the corner to walk along the street adjacent to Tom's Diner

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and walking past the neon-lit Tom's Diner

entered.detail: circular red neon sign reading 'Tom's Diner' mounted on the building corner
narrower street opening between buildings leading toward the megabuilding

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player turning right at the corner, walking closely past Tom's Diner with its prominent neon signage. The view opens toward a narrower street ahead with the massive megabuilding still visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a transit overpass into the bright, industrial sprawl of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive overpass lined with digital billboards and graffiti, moving steadily from the shade toward the glare of an open street. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the view expands to reveal a red industrial building on the left and a towering megabuilding looming ahead, passing a pedestrian in pink pants along the way. The environment then shifts into a more industrial zone characterized by prominent smokestacks and an elevated walkway, crossing a busy intersection past a teal car as the traffic light changes. Finally, the camera turns right to glide past the neon signage of Tom's Diner, opening onto a narrower street with the distant megabuilding still dominating the horizon.
